name: solve-screenshot
title: Solve Screenshot with AI
description: Capture a screenshot, ask Claude or Codex to solve the question in it, and copy the answer to the clipboard.
author: aksay_kanthan

commands.name: solve-screenshot
commands.title: Solve Screenshot with AI
commands.subtitle: Solve screenshot and copy to clipboard
commands.description: Capture a screenshot, ask Claude or Codex to solve the question in it, and copy the answer to the clipboard.

preferences.name: solver
preferences.title: AI Solver
preferences.description: Choose the AI CLI used to analyse the screenshot.

preferences.name: screenshotMode
preferences.title: Screenshot Mode
preferences.description: Full screen captures everything. Select Area lets you drag to pick a region.

preferences.name: systemPrompt
preferences.title: System Prompt
preferences.description: Instructions sent to the AI. Leave blank to use the default (solve the question and return Python code).
preferences.placeholder: Solve the question and output only the final answer as Python code…

preferences.name: showProgress
preferences.title: Show Progress
preferences.label: Show progress toasts while solving
preferences.description: Display step-by-step toasts (taking screenshot, solving, copied). Errors always surface regardless of this setting.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
